title: [Nyessem, Promenade]
description: A long glass window tinted pale yellow dominates one side of this room, offering guests a view of the Ring Loop below.  In combination with the blue mist above, a pale green light is cast across the floor and the white stone walls opposite.  The walls house arch-shaped hollows with sunflower-threaded curtains cinched above them.  A cushioned wood couch and a gem-studded stone settee are placed before the window, offering guests a place to sit.  A narrow descent returns to the Ring Loop.
